prompt: 35mm fashion-editorial photography of a young creative director woman sitting inside a giant claw machine filled entirely with artistic objects instead of toys, uploaded face used 100% as reference. Oversized mechanical claws hover above her, creating tension, surreal scale, and a symbolic sense of being surrounded by endless creative possibilities. The color palette combines muted whites, cool silvers, faded blues, and subtle neon pink and lime-green accents from the arcade lighting. The atmosphere feels symbolic, playful, and emotionally intense, like a luxury fashion advertisement fused with a viral conceptual art installation. Highly cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic skin texture, realistic glass reflections, shallow depth of field, premium editorial storytelling, soft film grain, fashion-magazine quality, immersive environmental detail, luxury campaign aesthetic, masterpiece composition, ultra-sharp focus, professional color grading, visually rich and emotionally engaging scene.
